horoscope: Venus and Saturn meet in your sign today, dear Aries, and you want to be useful and productive, but you also need to enjoy yourself as you do. You get a keen sense of your capabilities, so you're neither over- nor underestimating them, leading to sound judgments. Getting serious about a plan or responsibility can be in focus, and it suits you well. You're taking a more mature and realistic look at things. While you're clearer than usual, you're nevertheless at risk of taking on or assuming more than your share of responsibility--something to watch for. Otherwise, making mature choices feels good right now.

You have an excellent sense of your priorities today, dear Taurus, which empowers you. Taking control of your life and meeting your responsibilities requires time and energy, and transits today put you in a stronger position to see what is and isn't worth pursuing. It can be a time to address outstanding problems or loose ends, or to organize or sort them out. Venus aligns with Saturn, and a stronger conviction that you can reach your goals is building. Making mature choices feels good right now! You're more likely to want to go your own way, but consciously open yourself up to the possibilities that others are showing you the way toward positive change. Focusing on others can be rewarding, particularly if you are helping out.

You want to be productive today, dear Gemini, but your focus is less on practical pursuits than happiness goals. You generally have your priorities straight, and you're inclined to seek stability in your social life. Today's transits highlight the viability of a project or long-term goal, and perhaps even a special bond with someone. A more realistic view of a goal, dream, or friendship is likely now, after some rumination, and you see what's worth your time and effort. It's a period when you more clearly see how you impact others, especially friends and networks. Committing yourself to a longer-term goal or pursuit can feel good and enjoyable now.

Getting satisfying and meaningful work done can be in focus today, dear Cancer. You might solve a complex problem or uncover a resource that helps you tremendously. Venus and Saturn meet in your solar tenth house, and being conservative, realistic, and disciplined seems to reap the most rewards. In fact, you can feel bonded with others or better about yourself through making responsible or mature choices now. You may be taking on a new responsibility that involves hard work or some personal sacrifices, but feels completely worth the effort. It's a generally good day for your reputation. You might get serious about a career matter, rule, or responsibility. You might also break through a barrier or problem, and this comes as a pleasant relief. It's a strong time for looking critically at problem areas.

Transits today encourage you to reach beyond your usual routines, while also enjoying a mature, responsible approach to your life, dear Leo. You may need to attend to an obligation, or you could have a serious discussion or important word on a matter related to education or travel. You could gravitate toward someone with a unique perspective or consider ways to create a promotional campaign. Today’s energies remind you of a need to think seriously about the future, but it’s a pleasant experience to take on a more mature, reasonable outlook. Knowing where you stand is grounding and supportive.

You're in great shape for throwing your heart into research or an absorbing passion project, dear Virgo. The chance to settle a tricky matter can emerge, and you can be especially interested in doing your best. There are solutions to problems to be discovered, and they're likely to be practical ones! Efforts to organize and minimize debt get powerful support. At the same time, you may be hunkering down and facing reality about a financial or intimate matter, and it feels good to face things maturely. Realities can surface in a relationship, loan, job, or similar situation. Whatever this is, it comes with responsibility! You're in a position to consider your future and the impact your current choices may have. Making reasonable choices and decisions can be in focus, or you may gain wise counsel and resolve to make improvements. Others find your maturity attractive.

Today’s transits encourage you to find a balanced perspective, dear Libra, and drawing on patience can be rewarding. Reaching a compromise, negotiating, or meeting someone halfway feels satisfying and mature. Someone might remind you of your obligations, or you are committing to coming through for a special person. Your interactions with a significant other can be instructive, and a responsible, simple, and forthright approach seems most appropriate and beneficial as Venus aligns with Saturn in your partnership sector. It can also be a good time for counseling or understanding something important through a conversation, feedback, or interaction. Making mutually beneficial deals or agreements can be in the spotlight.

You're especially aware of the details required to get a job done, which helps you tremendously today, dear Scorpio. With Venus and Saturn meeting in your sector of work and health, you can get a nice sense that you're facing reality or meeting your responsibilities in these areas. It's a fine time to tidy up your daily routines and habits, and you may very well take pleasure in putting things in order. However, if things are lacking in these areas, a reality check, new responsibility, or problem to manage can emerge now. While a little stark or serious, it puts you "in the know" and in a better position to make the right decisions for yourself. You might make a pleasant commitment to a work or self-care goal. Spiffing up your routines can be satisfying now.

Today's transits incline you to want to specialize, dear Sagittarius, and dealing with a reality about a situation is empowering. You may be getting serious about a relationship or project, and you can feel particularly powerful as you develop a hobby or creative project. You might gain an advantage in your current pursuits. There could be a renewal of a commitment, but today's transits can bring complicated logistics or problems to light in a love relationship. It might also be a time for seeing someone more realistically, and this may be a child, a lover, or a friend. For some, it's about seeing a project in a more realistic light. Either way, it's a mostly pleasant experience, as you're in a better position to know your next step. Others find you particularly appealing as you express or demonstrate your maturity.

You’re in a better position to bring more stability from the bottom up, dear Capricorn, as Venus and Saturn meet in your solar fourth house. You crave more security, and you can quite enjoy taking steps to improve family matters, domestic issues, or your personal life. The desire for more harmony and balance in your domestic world is strong and motivating, but drawing on the patience to build these things is what sets things apart. It’s a fine time to consciously carve out more time to attend to your emotional life or support systems. While the intangibles are important to you now, the practical side is strongly on your mind. As you strengthen or straighten out your home environment, improved inner clarity can result. Dialing things back a little makes sense now, and simplifying makes sense, but you also want to be productive.

You take pleasure in meeting your responsibilities or organizing your life today, dear Aquarius. The desire to contribute something of value or specialize and learn a topic more deeply can be a strong motivator. You're coming across maturely and perhaps as an advisor or mediator. Today's energies are solid for laying the groundwork for future success or a new, long-term project. Gaining a fuller sense of what you can and can't accomplish empowers you. Conversations tend to run on the serious or business-oriented side, and right now, you're interested in what's genuinely doable, not fantasies. You might look for opportunities to collaborate with someone or partner up on a communications project. Developing special skills can be satisfying. You're giving your interests or studies more attention and importance, and it works to your benefit.

Today's transits encourage you to be proactive, dear Pisces, and deal with problems before they have a chance to grow. It's a time to relish the idea of a long-term plan or to bond with someone over a shared goal, vision, or responsibility. You might even take some pleasure in making a budget, facing a financial situation confidently, or saving money. Paring down is easier if you have a solid goal in mind. You could be getting serious about a plan or responsibility, and it's satisfying. You're much happier with things that feel certain or well-defined today. You're motivated to sort out money matters or valuables, and taking charge of money and business matters that have fallen out of view can be empowering.
